name: Half-Time Score Update
description: Displays the half-time score with key first-half stats. Keeps fans engaged during the break with a quick summary of the opening 45 minutes.
guidelines: Score must be the dominant visual element in large, bold numerals. Club crests flanking the score. Goal scorers listed below with timestamps. Include 2-3 key stats (possession, shots, corners) in a clean stats bar. Dark background with blue accent lines.
